item.title: Boundaries are not disrespect.
item.dc:creator: rabbihimself

item.title: Good Guy Christian
item.description: From the project's website: "Together California will offer two studio apartments providing temporary housing for birth parents working towards family reunification or transitional housing for children aging out of foster care. A 7,000-square-foot Community Center will house the Together California offices and offer enriching programs and services to the entire community. Garden, recreational, and sports areas will create an engaging and healthy space for children and families in the community to come together, learn, collaborate, and care for each other." The Together California website: https://togethercalifornia.org/our-village/ Coverage by the AP: https://apnews.com/article/christian-bale-foster-homes-palmdale-dark-knight-0f7e046c7bd1c636efd78d44947fc1a6
item.dc:creator: 2shots2beers

item.title: Teeny tiny stompies
item.description: This made me happy, so I wanted to share it here in case anyone else needed a little happy too. Grabbed it from The Pipsqueakery on IG: https://www.instagram.com/the_pipsqueakery They are a rescue and sanctuary for small animals, so please do show them some support if you can. ♥️

item.title: Reddit Turned Me Into A Woman…?
item.description: Reddit Turned Me Into A Woman…? My latest YouTube video finally answers the question I’ve been avoiding - how did it come to this? Don’t miss this one, it’s a wild ride. Also, did you know the origin of my name? Now ya do... always a pun... https://youtu.be/kc4pOWAZ554 Also yes I use the word in here, as a side note, I am using this for context for a different era of time, I don't just throw the word around.
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Typical Clusterf**** - LA Sheriff Department Fire Rubber Bullets & Tear Gas at LAPD ... "Blue, Blue, hold your goddamn crossfire”
item.description: Officers with LAPD found themselves caught in the crossfire of tear gas and other less lethal munitions between themselves and deputies with the Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department during the violent dispersal of fleeing demonstrators. Los Angeles Alerts, an X account that shares highlights of notable police radio traffic events in the city, first shared the incident online in a social media post that quickly went viral. The audio was verified using the post’s time and an archived YouTube livestream of the police communications during the protests. Other instances of friendly fire were uncovered on the livestream before and after these events. The first report of friendly fire came in at 4:55 p.m. LAPD officers were coordinating with LASD to corral demonstrators at the corners of Temple and Main over the radios, trying to separate and push them away from City Hall. An officer shouts over the radio to LASD deputies at Main and Temple to “hold your goddamn crossfire here,” ending the radio call by saying “blue blue,” likely a reference to blue-on-blue friendly fire. The call either wasn’t heard or shared with LASD deputies because nearly 20 minutes later, another LAPD officer radioed to dispatch about an unruly crowd between Temple and First streets, they needed help clearing. He also reported another problem. “We’re still taking gas and less-lethal munitions from the Sheriffs over on Temple and Main.” An officer, unclear which department he represented, responded and relayed that he couldn’t do much to help: “Roger, we can only work on one problem here.” Three minutes later, another officer frantically radios from the same location, saying they were not only taking rocks and bottles, but were again being shot by LASD. The moment was also caught on video, showing deputies clearly unaware of who was on the other side of their weapons, firing pepper balls and other less-lethal rounds at and around a group of people in the middle of the street, including members of the press. https://lapublicpress.org/2025/06/ice-police-protest-lapd-lasd-tear-gas/
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

YOU KNOW WHO YOU ARE

IF THIS HORSE IS NOT VOICED BY FABIO LANZONI I SWEAR TO GOD! (also name him Mayor Pinyan, if you know you know)
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky http://onlyfans.abbii.gay: for Tips!
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Absolutely disgusting
item.description: This is the woman who was forced by the state to be kept on life support after she was declared brain dead in order to not "abort" the child she was pregnant with. And the family has to pay for the medical, when it has been made explicitly care that they don't want this to happen. Also, the baby is unlikely to survive, so this is all just cruelty (Insert alwayshasbeen.jpg) EDIT: just for clarification, not only is it horrendous that they made her body go through this even after brain death, causing her family immeasurable harm, but they are also making the family pay for something the state mandated that nobody wanted.
item.dc:creator: NooPogodi

item.title: The 522nd vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2025 ep 12 - TRANS TUESDAY!
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you either when I post or when I go Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse (The Stable) and PotatoCheesMonk's (Deviousness) Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays. https://discord.gg/JoinTheStable https://discord.gg/Deviousness These are both VERY safe places for LGBTQIA+ people, if you need a community, please stop in! AbbiiStabbii's server is also amazing, *especially* safe for Trans folk. @PlanckEraWasMyBestEra also has a server for Parents who are Trans https://discord.gg/transparents
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: Pushup Challenge ain't nothin for Rogue
item.description:
This year, I'm back doing 3,214 push-ups in 23 days as part of The Push-Up Challenge to raise awareness and funds for mental health in Australia.
We are currently 1,713 pushups down just over 1,500 to go! We have also raised over $580 for mental health support! Can we make it $600m This target represents the 3,214 people who died by suicide in Australia in 2023 (the most recent stats). You can push for better mental health too by donating to my fundraising page and supporting this important cause: www.thepushupchallenge.com.au/fundraisers/krissiq81114/the-push-up-challenge Funds raised will go to headspace National. Any donation, big or small, is really appreciated! Xx
item.dc:creator: Krissiq

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Ninja
item.description: Tiabeanie Tax: "The Fish-ious Hunter" Tiabeanie was just too perfect not to be her name. We've been calling her Bean and when I made the joke about calling her Tiabeanie it just sort of stuck. So here is our little Beanie Baby, on her second day, playing with her new favorite toy.

item.title: How to steal memes in your spare time
item.description:
5
10
A classic yet always fun joke
15
This is a meme to put in your thesis or scientific paper for professionnal purpose
20
Yeah I DL it cropped so no source sry
25. Look for it it's funny
Stop everything
30
Life is hard but so am I
That's it for today ! Have a good day ! And Week ! After that we'll see. Checkout my profile for other memes, or wait a week or so for more chaos
item.dc:creator: H4ppyMomo
